subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Now that thou art in the land of Egypt, the place of exile of Joseph of Canaan, in Alexandria [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الان که در ارض مصر هجرتگاه یوسف کنعانی مدینه اسکندریه در
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @Ottoman commissions of investigation
